info.title: Contact information
info.bookingDesc: Book your session and pay the 50% deposit directly online to secure your date.
info.responseDetail: We respond to all messages within 24 hours. For an immediate response write to us on WhatsApp.

booking.title: Prefer to talk before booking?
booking.subtitle: Schedule a free 15-minute video call to tell us about your session, ask questions and coordinate all the details before confirming your booking.
booking.note: You can also write to us directly on WhatsApp and we will reply within minutes.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions before booking a session in Santo Domingo.
faq.q1: Is a deposit required to book?
faq.a1: Yes — we require a non-refundable deposit of 50% of the total cost upon booking confirmation. The remaining 50% is paid on the day of the session before we begin.
faq.q2: Can I change the date of my session?
faq.a2: Yes — we allow one date change up to 72 hours before the session, subject to availability and at no additional cost.
faq.q3: When do I receive the photos after the session?
faq.a3: Edited high-resolution photos are delivered within 48-72 hours through a private online gallery ready to download.
faq.q4: Do you work with international clients?
faq.a4: Yes — most of our wedding and Punta Cana session clients are international. We speak Spanish and English.
